name: io.github.zoharbabin/web-researcher-mcp
description: MCP server providing web search, content extraction, and multi-source research tools for AI assistants

environment_variables.name: SEARCH_PROVIDER
environment_variables.description: Search provider to use (google, brave, serper, searxng, searchapi)

environment_variables.name: SEARCH_ROUTING
environment_variables.description: Multi-provider routing with automatic fallback (e.g. brave,google,serper)

environment_variables.name: BRAVE_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Brave Search API key (required if using brave provider)

environment_variables.name: SERPER_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Serper.dev API key (required if using serper provider)

environment_variables.name: SEARCHAPI_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: SearchAPI.io API key (required if using searchapi provider)

environment_variables.name: SEARXNG_URL
environment_variables.description: SearXNG instance URL (required if using searxng provider)

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web using configurable providers with optional search lenses

tools.name: scrape_page
tools.description: Extract content from URLs (web pages, PDFs, DOCX, YouTube) using a 4-tier scraping pipeline

tools.name: search_and_scrape
tools.description: Combined search and content extraction pipeline with quality scoring

tools.name: image_search
tools.description: Search for images with size and type filters

tools.name: news_search
tools.description: Search news articles with freshness controls

tools.name: academic_search
tools.description: Search academic papers via Scholar, arXiv, and PubMed

tools.name: patent_search
tools.description: Search patents with multi-office filtering (US, EP, WO, CN, JP, KR)

tools.name: sequential_search
tools.description: Multi-step research workflows with context tracking across queries
